name: private-views
title: OCI DNS — Private Views
summary: Creates private DNS views, each containing private primary zones and record sets (rrsets).

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory freeform tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' freeform tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' freeform tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional freeform tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: compartment_id
module.description: OCID of the compartment for the views and zones.

module.name: views
module.type: map(object({ zones = optional(map(object({ domain_name = string records = optional(map(object({ name = string type = string ttl = optional(number, 300) rdata = list(string) })), {}) })), {}) }))
module.description: Map of private DNS views keyed by logical name, each containing private zones with optional records. Views are resolution scopes: attach a view to a VCN resolver (oci/dns/resolver module, or any other means) to make its zones resolvable from that VCN. Zones here are scope = PRIVATE.

outputs.name: view_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical view name to DNS view OCID. Attach these to VCN resolvers (oci/dns/resolver) to enable resolution.

outputs.name: zone_ids
outputs.description: Map of '<view-key>/<zone-key>' to private zone OCID.

outputs.name: zone_names
outputs.description: Map of '<view-key>/<zone-key>' to zone domain name.
